info.name: MindCare AI Comprehensive API Collection
info.description: Complete collection for validating MindCare AI API modules. Includes Authentication (Module 2), Role Gating Checks, and Mood Tracking CRUD & Analytics (Module 4).

request.description: Register a new account. Supported roles are 'employee', 'practitioner', and 'admin'. A mock email activation link is logged to the server terminal console.
Authenticate user credentials. If verified, immediately issues active JWT session token.
Submit email to request password reset token. Token is printed in the server logs.
Reset password using token found in recovery link.
OAuth bridge receiving Google Token validations and issuing immediate session JWT.
GitHub OAuth login receiver.
Initiates the Google OAuth 2.0 flow. In a browser, this will redirect to Google's official sign-in screen.
Google callback verification endpoint. Exchanges code for user info, checks/creates profile, and redirects to frontend with JWT.
Initiates the GitHub OAuth flow. In a browser, this will redirect to GitHub's authorization consent screen.
GitHub callback verification endpoint. Exchanges code, retrieves public/private emails, checks/creates user, and redirects to frontend with JWT.
Get logged in user profile. Requires Bearer JWT in authorization header.
Requires 'employee' or 'admin' roles. Denies practitioners.
Creates a daily mood log. Enforces calendar day duplicate check (returns 409 Conflict if logged today already).
Returns active logs list for search query, support sorting, filtering and pagination.
Fetch details of individual active mood log by ID.
Update notes, tags, or parameter values on today's/any logged entry. Triggers score re-mapping if mood is changed.
Performs soft delete by setting `isDeleted: true` and `deletedAt` to current date.
Fetches mood averages (all-time, weekly, monthly), distribution rates and trend curves values.
Fetches current active streaks and longest streaks counts in days.
Fetch current user dashboard wellness metrics, streaks, progress and goals status for today.
Retrieve charts datasets including weekly mood trends, mood distribution, calendar heatmaps, and wellness score progress.
Fetch combined list of recent mood and journal entries along with dynamic Copilot AI suggestions.
Quick daily check-in from dashboard slider (mood value is mapped 1-5 where 3 is Neutral, 4 is Happy).
Saves quick journal thoughts from dashboard modal and triggers rule-based sentiment tagging.
Updates daily sleep hours, water intake in ml, and meditation time to compute wellness stats.
Erases user logs and seeds 15 days of randomized, realistic health telemetry data to populate graphs and streaks immediately.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Reflecting on today's progress",
  "content": "**What went well today:**

I managed to complete the sprint tasks on time. The team collaboration was excellent and I felt genuinely productive.

**What I'm grateful for:**

1. Supportive team members
2. Good health
3. Clear weather for my morning walk",
  "mood": "😊 Happy",
  "tags": ["productivity", "gratitude", "work"],
  "category": "daily-reflection"
}

request.description: Sends user message to Groq AI advisor. Injecting 7-day health metrics in backend prompt. Supply conversationId to append to existing history.
Retrieves the list of all conversations for the authenticated user, sorted by last updated.
Retrieves the complete message history of a specific conversation session.
Removes the conversation history document from the database.
Calculates daily wellness insights, stress pattern indicators, custom tip of the day, and returns last active conversation details.
Fetches compound streaks, weekly averages, and latest health history summaries for the client view.
Calculates average stress, anxiety, energy scores, and pie chart distribution lists.
Gathers journal sentiments distribution counts, writing length statistics, and weekly entry totals.
Computes current logging streak metrics and matches against the user's all-time record streak.
Builds structured text reports in JSON format summarizing logging occurrences and average sleep statistics.
Streams structured comma-separated data as a download attachment to import immediately in spreadsheet clients.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Read a book chapter",
  "description": "Read CBT methodologies in morning",
  "category": "Mindfulness",
  "priority": "medium",
  "targetDate": "2026-07-15"
}

request.description: Creates a new goal record and awards 50 experience points (XP).
Fetches all goals created by the authenticated user.
Updates goal parameters. Marking a goal as completed awards 150 experience points (XP) and checks for badges.
Deletes the target goal by ID.
Schedules a new habits checking task log.
Fetches all active habits and dynamically computes today's toggle completion statuses.
Toggles habit completion on a given date. Grants 30 XP on completion check-in, or deducts 30 XP on untoggling.
Retrieves the compound habits completion rate %, max streaks, levels, and badge awards.
Deletes the target habit by ID.
